title: cerastium dichotomum subsp. inflatum
intro: Cerastium dichotomum subsp. inflatum, also known as the Inflated Mouse-ear Chickweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Cerastium dichotomum subsp. inflatum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and soothe digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, salves, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
